sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n47043" key="h(mia/rtabos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἡμι-άρτᾰβος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n47043.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">of half an</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἀρτάβη, μέτρον</foreign> ib.<bibl n="Perseus:abo:pap,P.Oxy.:1031:22" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1031.22</biblScope> </bibl> <date TEIform="date">(iii A.D.)</date>.</sense> </entryFree>
